**Deciding on strike announcement**

I need to determine if the document is announcing a new strike. The content indicates a 24-hour strike on December 13, 2024, due to an update regarding the acceptance of a request. It confirms that it’s an announcement of the upcoming strike. So, I should set isStrike to true. Now, I have to fill in the strikeData with the start and end dates formatted as 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'.
